name: Mid-dry connected 873, BTN SRP
description: Mid-board rainbow with some connectivity (65 makes a straight draw, 87 is top pair). Not as wet as a two-tone but enough action that BTN can't just auto c-bet. Ranges are BTN SRP open (hero) vs BB defend (villain). Tests the solver's handling of medium-texture flops where neither range has a dominant equity edge.

input.hero_range: 22+, A2s, A3s, A4s, A5s, A6s, A7s, A8s, A9s, ATs, AJs, AQs, AKs, K9s, KTs, KJs, KQs, Q9s, QTs, QJs, J9s, JTs, T9s, 98s, 87s, 76s, 65s, A9o, ATo, AJo, AQo, AKo, KTo, KJo, KQo, QTo, QJo, JTo
input.villain_range: 55-TT, A2s, A3s, A4s, A5s, A6s, A7s, A8s, A9s, ATs, AJs, AQs, AKs, K2s, K3s, K4s, K5s, K6s, K7s, K8s, K9s, KTs, KJs, KQs, Q7s, Q8s, Q9s, QTs, QJs, J8s, J9s, JTs, T7s, T8s, T9s, 97s, 98s, 86s, 87s, 75s, 76s, 64s, 65s, 53s, 54s, A9o, ATo, AJo, AQo, AKo, KTo, KJo, KQo, QTo, QJo, JTo

expected_notes: Populated by differential run. Expected: BTN c-bets less often than on Ah-high / Q-high dry because BB's range connects better (65, 87, 98 all made/drawing).
